title: CYP2D6 splice defect causing reduced function
summary: CYP2D6 splice defect causing reduced function
detail: rs79292917 is an SNP in the CYP2D6 gene. As of 12 March 2019 it is only found in the CYP2D6*59.001 allele, which has shows reduced functionality due to this splice defect. See [https://www.pharmvar.org/gene/CYP2D6 PharmVar] for more information.
